title: ODS Check Output v1
description: Output of `ods check --json`: the policy gate's verdict. `allowed` is authoritative (deny always wins); `review_tier` is an advisory routing signal for allowed changes and never affects the gate itself.

allowed.description: Whether the policy allows the change to merge. False whenever any deny rule fired.

denials.description: Messages from deny rules that fired. Non-empty implies allowed=false.

warnings.description: Messages from warn rules that fired. Advisory only.

review_tier.description: The policy's review-routing verdict: how much human attention the change needs. Omitted when the policy defines no review_tier rule (consumers treat that as "standard"). Meaningful only when allowed=true — a blocked PR is never routed. Implementations MUST fall back to "standard" (with a warning) when a policy returns a value outside this enum, rather than failing the gate.
